reforms.description: The authorities decided to modify the nation's science and technology policy to achieve greater economic diversification by channeling more public resources into this area and merging the Science and Research Councils.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public investment in science and technology is expected to enhance economic diversification and innovation capacity.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the science and technology policy framework.
reforms.source_quote: The authorities have also decided to modify the nation's science and technology policy with a view to achieving greater economic diversification.

reforms.description: The government proposed a Fisheries Development Fund aimed at reducing capacity in the fishing industry and supporting investment in overseas fisheries activities by Icelandic firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund is intended to support sustainable investment and innovation in the fisheries sector, which can enhance economic performance.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal for the fund has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This fund represents a major initiative to address challenges in the fishing industry and promote investment.
reforms.source_quote: Over the medium term the government hopes to encourage further retirement of small boats and older trawlers, thereby boosting productivity and profitability in the industry, through a proposed Fisheries Development Fund.
